title: Protein Neighbors and Proximity Proteomics.
author: Rees JS Li XW Perrett S Lilley KS Jackson AP
content: S-EPMC4638030 PMC4638030 Protein Neighbors and Proximity Proteomics. Within cells, proteins can co-assemble into functionally integrated and spatially restricted multicomponent complexes.
